scripts.install: if [ -n "$VITE_API_URL" ]; then cd client && npm install; else cd server && npm install; fi
scripts.build: if [ -n "$VITE_API_URL" ]; then cd client && npm run build; else cd server && npm run build; fi
scripts.start: if [ -n "$VITE_API_URL" ]; then npm install -g serve && serve -s client/dist -p ${PORT:-8080}; else cd server && npm start; fi
